user.title: Position and weather data (FAO-56)
user.description: Global parameters and the weather entities used to compute daily ET0. Wind gust is optional and is not required for ET0.

rain.title: Rain
rain.description: Daily rainfall and rain rate are required. 24h rainfall and rain event are optional/diagnostic only.

soil.title: WH51 soil moisture (per zone)
soil.description: Battery and signal entities are optional.

zones.title: Zones and distribution
zones.description: Rainwater tank mm/minute may be left empty if not yet calibrated.

data.zone1_mm_per_minute_mains: Zone 1 mains water: mm per minute
data.zone1_mm_per_minute_tank: Zone 1 rainwater tank: mm per minute (leave empty if not calibrated)
data.zone1_flow_rate_mains_lpm: Zone 1 mains water: estimated flow rate (L/min)
data.zone2_mm_per_minute_mains: Zone 2 mains water: mm per minute
data.zone2_mm_per_minute_tank: Zone 2 rainwater tank: mm per minute (leave empty if not calibrated)
data.zone2_flow_rate_mains_lpm: Zone 2 mains water: estimated flow rate (L/min)

error.entity_wrong_domain: This entity must be a sensor entity.
error.entity_wrong_unit: This entity's unit of measurement is not compatible.
error.entity_not_numeric: This entity's current state is not a numeric value.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Garden Irrigation is already configured; only one instance is allowed.

init.title: Garden Irrigation options
init.description: The full set of operational options (Kc, thresholds, caps, ...) is added in later milestones.

record_irrigation.name: Record irrigation cycle
record_irrigation.description: Record a manually executed irrigation cycle for a zone. Uses the current timestamp only (no backdating); the water-balance deficit is updated only if the chosen source is calibrated for that zone.

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: The zone the cycle was run on.

source.name: Source
source.description: The water source used for the cycle.

duration_minutes.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_minutes.description: Cycle duration in minutes, greater than 0 and at most 15 per call.

idempotency_key.name: Idempotency key
idempotency_key.description: Optional: repeating a call with the same key is a no-op (protects against accidental double submission).

wh51_stale.title: Soil moisture sensor not updating ({zone_id})
wh51_stale.description: The WH51 soil moisture sensor for {zone_id} has not reported a new value within the expected time. Check the sensor's battery, signal, and connectivity.

weather_stale.title: Weather data not updating
weather_stale.description: One or more of the weather entities used to compute ET0 have not reported a new value within the expected time. ET0 and the recommendation may be unavailable until this is resolved.
